name: PLAY

milestones.label: 2 free BookMyShow movie tickets (up to ₹250 each) on monthly spend of ₹5,000

milestoneBenefits: Spend ₹5,000 or more in a billing month to get 2 free movie/stream/event tickets worth up to ₹250 each on BookMyShow
additionalBenefits: ₹500 welcome discount on BookMyShow on any booking within 30 days of card issuance
Up to ₹100 off on food and beverages when booking movie tickets with the card on BookMyShow
Annual fee waived for BookMyShow Superstar members (users who complete 10 transactions on BookMyShow in a membership year)
additionalDetails: Excluded categories from the ₹1.5 Lakhs fee waiver spend include: Fuel, Auto, Insurance, Utilities, Real Estate/Rental, Cash/Quasi-cash, Railways, Education, Wallet, Government.
Fuel surcharge waiver of 1% at all fuel stations for transactions between ₹500 and ₹4,000 (Max waiver ₹100/month).

salaried: Minimum age: 21 years, Maximum age: 70 years
Stable income source meeting bank criteria
selfEmployed: Minimum age: 21 years, Maximum age: 70 years
Stable business income meeting bank criteria

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14. Card does not earn reward points. Welcome and monthly benefits are delivered through BookMyShow platform.
